diagnostics.message: Configuration value 'max_attempts' is 0. Zero means unlimited retries which may cause infinite execution loops.
Configuration value 'backoff_multiplier' is 1.0. No exponential backoff means constant retry rate.
Step 'infinite-retry-step' has max_attempts: 0 which means unlimited retries. Consider setting a finite limit.
Value 100 is above the allowed range (0-10) for property 'max_attempts'
Configuration value 'delay_ms' is 0. No delay between retries may cause a tight spin loop.
